_note: 12 birds for hours 1-12 of the cuckoo clock. Each has a look (for image gen) and a call (Web Audio synth params). hour = which o'clock this bird appears at.
style_preamble: Children's storybook illustration of a single small bird, drawn as a classic German Black-Forest cuckoo-clock carving reimagined as a warm friendly wooden toy. Soft cel shading, thick clean dark-brown outline, gentle warm light from the upper-left. Cute, rounded, appealing to toddlers, never scary. Side profile, the bird facing RIGHT, head slightly raised and beak just open as if singing. Whole bird centered, filling about 80% of the frame. Pure fully-transparent background (real alpha channel), absolutely no scenery, no perch, no ground, no drop shadow, no text, no border. Part of a cohesive set of 12 birds that MUST share identical art style, line weight, proportions and lighting. Render 1024x1024 transparent PNG.

birds.subject: a cuckoo: slender soft grey-brown body, faintly barred pale chest, small pointed beak, long tail, tiny perky crest.
a European robin: round body, bright orange-red face and breast, warm brown back, short straight beak.
a blue tit: blue cap and wings, bright lemon-yellow belly, white cheeks, tiny beak.
a sparrow: chubby brown and cream body, streaked wings, short conical beak, plain and homely.
a Japanese bush warbler (uguisu): soft olive-green body, pale eyebrow stripe, slim beak, elegant.
a budgerigar parakeet: green and yellow body, small head with cere, tiny hooked beak, cheerful.
a canary: bright sunny-yellow plump body, small orange beak, glossy and joyful.
a little owl: round fluffy tan body, large round eyes, tiny beak, short ear tufts, very cute and sleepy.
a kingfisher: brilliant turquoise-blue back and head, bright orange belly, long straight dagger beak.
a red crested finch (cardinal-like): vivid red body, pointed crest, black mask around a thick orange beak.
a hummingbird: tiny iridescent emerald-green body, magenta throat, very long needle beak, blurred fast wings.
a long-tailed tit (shima-enaga, snow fairy): a fluffy round ball of pure white down, tiny black eyes, tiny beak, very long thin tail, magical and delicate.
